column3: Tests a model's ability to retrieve a specific piece of information (the 'needle') hidden within a large amount of irrelevant text (the 'haystack'). (Our version: Split input pdf into chunks with each chunk starting from page 1 up to page k (example: 0-100, 0-150, 0-200, …). Add the needle at the end of each chunk. Ask the model to find it (maybe implement a search algorithm to find the answer to make it faster).)
